acceptance_criteria: A committed report records whether loop_lib provides a state machine, retry policy, durable state, event log, parallel lanes, step budgets, watchdogs, and failure classification.
The report compares loop_lib semantics with handoff task/ledger semantics and names the best fit for PR repair supervisor execution.
If loop_lib is not selected, the rejection includes code/command evidence and the chosen replacement path.
The decision is cross-linked from `.handoff/pr-repair` and can be used by `TASK-PRR-0005` supervisor-loop implementation.
objective: Decide: Complete `.idea` Research Track D by inspecting `loop_lib`, `loop_cli`, `envctl`, and `handoff` to determine whether `loop_lib` should provide the execution engine for the PR-repair supervisor loop and bounded repair workflows.

source_gap_audit.reason: Deep .idea revisit found Research Track D had no executable task.

title: [architect] Close loop_lib repair-runner model inspection
